[正面] 以养成为主的卡牌游戏，搭配了日语配音和中二演出效果的卡牌手感不错，单论这点应该能钓到牌佬。
但坏就坏...
items.summary:
以养成为主的卡牌游戏，搭配了日语配音和中二演出效果的卡牌手感不错，单论这点应该能钓到牌佬。
但坏就坏在它的养成机制很长，它的剧情也很长，很无聊，剧情和养成绑一起，就意味着光是打完第一章就已经让牌佬心衰力竭。
鼠标点到手都疼，还不敢跳过，怕错过什么重大机制提醒，结果事实证明是我多虑
综上，钓上牌佬的可能性降低了很多

items.title: [正面] preety good card game akin to slay the spire and n...
items.summary:
preety good card game akin to slay the spire and new and unique characters to sate anybody's husbando's or waifus.

Tip though, stick to one team and that team for resources as it takes alot to raise a set of 4 character team up and hp scales to account level which if your just doing your dailies and using your xp accordingly in events and doing dream dives everyday which is like at most 20 minutes you'll gradually raise your level to approprietly do higher level content

Another thing, the english translation is currently gpt but understandable but i can understand if some peeps will decide to put this one off till they get better translation but the story is neat and i'm looking forward to proper english translation.

Besides that learn as ya go and good luck!
